rulings.Case Title: ALFRED PISTILLI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Elliott Company¿S Taking Of Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents And Plaintiffs¿ Motion To Compel Defendant Elliott Company¿S Taking Of Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, November 30, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Elliott Company¿s deposition and production of documents is granted. The scope of the deposition and document requests is limited to 1945 through 1966. The deposition and document production must occur no later than December 17, 2010 and shall occur after the deposition of Alfred A. Pistilli. No responsive documents that have previously been produced to the Brayton office need to be produced provided that defendant identifies the date(s) and case(s) the documents have previously been produced. = (220/HEK)
